title: Diabetes cardiac risk documentation

investigations.text: Specifies hypoglycaemia awareness, home glucose review, BP and BMI, renal testing, urine ACR, HbA1c, cholesterol, podiatry, and retinal review.
investigations.rationale: The DHA section supports documenting a diabetes review that includes blood pressure, weight, cardiovascular-risk context, laboratory review, complications, medicine adherence, and agreed follow-up without generating treatment.
investigations.evidence_extract: Specifies hypoglycaemia awareness, home glucose review, BP and BMI, renal testing, urine ACR, HbA1c, cholesterol, podiatry, and retinal review.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Type 2 Diabetes – 30

medication.text: Supports clinician-led cardiovascular risk review and documented lifestyle discussion without autonomously generating advice.
medication.rationale: The NICE section supports clinician-led cardiovascular-risk review and documented discussion without generating a score, medicine, or advice.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-led cardiovascular risk review and documented lifestyle discussion without autonomously generating advice.

source.title: Cardiovascular disease: risk assessment and reduction, including lipid modification

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.1.1–1.3.12 — cardiovascular risk and lifestyle review

source_limitations: Diabetes type and duration, glycaemia, blood pressure, lipids, kidney status, smoking, weight, complications, medicines, adherence, hypoglycaemia, validated risk, treatment, referral, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
